dominant_tier: HIGH (additive; one recursive dir watch dominates)
ranking_note: 20 single-file write/attr watches on deep nested paths (LOW each, 900 B) PLUS one RECURSIVE /etc/security/ directory watch (HIGH, recursive subtree f3 section 2.2). The cost model must RANK the recursive dir watch ABOVE all 20 single-file watches combined and not treat path DEPTH as a volume signal (a deep path does not mean more events; recursion does). Parser must handle long paths.

LOW: 20 single-file -w watches on deep paths (LOW each, 900 B)

rate_band_basis: f3 section 6: recursive dir watch HIGH (low1k/typ20k/high200k); single-file watches LOW. Path depth is NOT a volume signal.
note: Per-file-watch lines summarized (count high); the ranking + the recursive-vs-file distinction are the assertions.
